title: BIS Selected Residential Property Prices — full bulk dataset (CSV, flat)
countries: ALL (world, BIS-reporting economies; IRN not a BIS reporter — KOR/TUR/USA/DEU/FRA/GBR/ITA/NLD/ESP/PRT/GRC included)
time_coverage: long historical run through most recent quarter (series start dates vary by country)
units: index numbers, described in file / BIS data dictionary
license_terms: BIS Terms of Use — free for non-commercial use with attribution
notes: Full-topic bulk zip, world coverage, flat CSV format. Uncompressed CSV ~6.6MB; zip 0.3MB.
